items: threading.Lock() — Imagine two customers ordering at the same time. Without a lock, both orders might try to write to the file simultaneously, corrupting the data. The lock makes them take turns. This is called thread safety.
with open(DATA_FILE, "r") as f — Opens the file for reading ("r"). The with keyword automatically closes the file when done, even if an error occurs.
json.load(f) / json.dump(items, f) — These convert between Python data and JSON format. load reads JSON from a file into Python. dump writes Python data as JSON to a file.
